text.message: hm, does the interface font look a bit different today to you guys?
yeah everything is too small it looks bad hahah
im playing on desktop and the chat is huge
yeah new dice sound is annoying
it sounds like there are 10 dice lol
im dead last and got plowed i have to do something
still me when im settled out?
i mean mr red has a city
until i get a city it does not matter
so let's leave the guy at 7 alone
and fight between our 4 points lol
im gonna get robbed into oblivion
just pls be careful about letting someone else get too strong
atleast he put u under haha
can we please hit red now
he can do more than me
we need to see reds devs
yeah i didnt pull it red probably has it
holding out for the mega mono eh
No, tried to use a RB
blue might just build to 10 at this point
if only we had blocked blue
blue's dice luck just turned around like crazy
prob not if he does have a rb
if they actually do have rb maybe not
my two roads might have saved the game lol
i told i have the mono lol
pls dont overrob the guy stuck on 7 next time
